text:
e method followed by the Nadi texts that on
any day the five elements(Bhutas, Tattvas) follow one another
in a regular sequence. The sex of the person is determined by
the element ruling at that time. It is also related to the con
stellation in which the Moon is found at that time. Thus births
are possible at certain times. However births appear at certain
fixed times or intervals of time.
The lunar mansion, the element or tattvas operating on
the weekday, and the Sun are the factors to be taken into
account. The elements or tattvas are Prithivi (Earth), Apas
(Water), Tejas (light and heat), Vayu (wind), and Akasa
(Ether). These are responsible for all physiological, psycho
logical, and biological changes. They together constitute the
physical body and the universe around us. All matter on earth
has the quality of these five elements.
The five tattvas repeat after every ninety minutes, on any
day these sixteen such repetitions. The duration of each
tattvas is fixed.
